description: Gathers split text objects back to their original positions. Accepts split object labels (e.g., SP_split0) registered by TextSplitCommand, or a textsplit command label (e.g., SP) to gather all its splits at once. Reverses the textsplit animation to reunite text elements.
utility: Animate text gathering — bring split elements back together

arguments.name: split_object
arguments.description: Split object label(s) (SP_split0, SP_split1) or textsplit command label (SP). Multiple arguments allowed to gather specific splits or all from a textsplit.

alternates.description: Gather a specific split object back to original position
Gather all split objects from a textsplit command by its label
Gather with custom duration and color

examples.expression:
M = write(at(3,2), "x^2 + y^2 = r^2")
s1 = select(M, "x^2", 1)
s2 = select(M, "y^2", 1)
SP = textsplit(s1, s2)
textgather(SP)

M = write(at(3,2), "int f(x) dx")
sel = select(M, "int", 1)
SP = textsplit((sel, buff(-2, 0)))
textgather(SP, t(1.0))
